title: ipomoea calycina
intro: Ipomoea calycina, also known as the pink morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the morning glory family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, headache, and cough. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Ipomoea calycina is often combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to alleviate various health issues.
